channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Temple Israel rebuilds after terror attack
item.description: Two months ago, a gunman drove through the preschool at Temple Israel, the largest synagogue in Michigan. Every child and teacher survived, but the co...

item.title: Of course we look for ourselves in art — but if we stop there, we're missing out
item.description: As I watched the new series, I only cared about Piggy — the thoughtful, smart kid stranded on an island with other boys. That made me think about what...

item.title: Keir Starmer's party lost big in U.K. local elections. Here's what comes next
item.description: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected c...

item.title: Happy Mother's Day to the kindest mom. P.S. Your kindness annoyed me when I was a kid
item.description: She and her siblings had to make tea for and share food with every visitor. That did not make her happy. Today she has a different perspective. So she...
